what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment record in YAML frontmatter that links the design-source channel to an image asset identified by image://design-source/vt-architects/p-2.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content
The target is an image URI 'image://design-source/vt-architects/p-2'
An ISO timestamp '2026-06-22T11:31:03.341092+00:00' is recorded in the 'added' field
standouts: Attachment of an image asset to the design-source channel
notes: A lightweight, timestamped metadata stub that attaches a specific design-source image to a channel memory entry.
questions: Why was this particular image attached to the design-source channel at this time?
Is there a corresponding channel memory entry that references this attachment?
intention_signals: It appears intended to record and preserve a reference to a visual design artifact so it can be retrieved alongside channel memory content.
novelty: It uses a custom image:// URI scheme to address a design-source asset rather than a filesystem path.
contribution: It contributes a typed, timestamped link between a channel memory context and a specific image asset, supporting visual design traceability without embedding the image itself.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record with id att-b53f903a that links the design-source channel to the image asset image://design-source/vt-architects/p-2 and records an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To attach and catalog a specific design-source image asset to a channel memory entry for later retrieval and reference.
